author: yesbhautik
name: DominationV2: 11L XSA4 + EMA + TTT + Int6 MLP3x
blurb: 11-layer MLP-3x with XSA (Exclusive Self Attention) on last 4 layers, EMA weight averaging (decay 0.997), 3-epoch SGD test-time training, per-dim SmearGate, BigramHash(2048x128), int6 per-row quantization (mlp+attn), zstd-22, Muon WD=0.04, sliding eval stride=64.
